$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C5 2026-07-17): the RUN witness for the TCL command-introspection layer (Tcl_CmdInfo struct + Tcl_GetCommandInfo/SetCommandInfo/DeleteCommand). The FIRST field-access shipped struct in tcl.json: DSS models Tcl_CmdInfo's 8 fields so `info.isNativeObjectProc`/`info.clientData` resolve + libtcl fills it at the ABI offsets. Registers a command, introspects it (Tcl_GetCommandInfo fills info), asserts info.isNativeObjectProc==1 (a runtime layout witness — offset 0), writes a field + Tcl_SetCommandInfo, evals the command -> 42, deletes it. The Tcl_CmdInfo introspection shape test_backup.c uses. elf-x86_64 only; ubuntu x86_64 CI legs run it (libtcl8.6), native-arm64 arch-gates, win/macos compile-only. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert tcl.json's elf `library` to libc.so.6 -> undefined symbol at load, exit 127.
